content: ICM curiosity-driven exploration in 2025 autonomous agents can be adapted to chunk multi-step reasoning information into 3–5 coherent clusters, directly mitigating performance degradation caused by agent working memory capacity limits. This reframes curiosity from a general exploration tool to a structured reasoning organizer that works with, rather than against, the inherent bounded capacity of agent working memory.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
trigger_topic: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
